fieldsetContactDescription: Choose what to show in the listing: phone number, e-mail address, or both.
fieldsetPhoneDescription: The phone number displayed in the listing is always the same as the number added to and verified on the account and cannot be edited while creating a listing. To use a different phone number, you must add and verify a new number on your account. This approach helps prevent fraud, impersonation, and other forms of abuse.
information: Each listing is created for a period of 1 month. After that, it must be renewed to remain active. Renewal is possible only when less than 30 days remain until the listing expires.
informationCompany: If the limit is exceeded, each additional listing will incur a fee according to the current pricing. The listing duration is determined in months within the {{countMonths}} plan. After that time, it must be renewed to stay active.
title: New company listing
warning: {{countUsed}} out of {{countPlanLimit}} free listings available in your plan for this month have been used.
